goal: Maintain governance-grade reliability for OpenCode agents and validation workflows.
decisions: Use deny-by-default permissions with explicit allowlists.
Gate risk-sensitive changes in CI before merge.
open_risks: Scenario-level behavioral eval coverage is still limited.
Ownership enforcement is advisory until CODEOWNERS is added.
next_actions: Add scenario-based eval fixtures for orchestrator/review behavior.
Track eval trend deltas across releases.
